---
title: "00_basics"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# basics

```{julia}
# string
# definition
str = 'a'
aciistr = Int(str) # return the aciistr.
println("Acii码: ", Int(str))
println("字符", Char(aciistr))
```

```{julia}
# 切片
str = "hello"
str1 = str[1];
strend = str[end];
strpart = str[1:end];
println("对应字符, ", str1, strend, strpart)
splicingstr = string(str1, strpart);
println("拼接字符串: $splicingstr, *也可以:$(str1 * strpart)") # 乘，新奇。
println("重复拼接$(str1 ^ 3)") # ^ repeat the string.
```

```{julia}
# other function
println("trans to lowercase $(lowercase(str))")
println("trans to uppercase $(uppercase(str))")
println("replace some part in string $(replace(str, 'e'=>'a'))")
```
